retrieved_result: Nitric Oxide: The New Hero of Human Biology "Nitric Oxide: The New Hero of Human Biology A few extra minutes on the stairmaster might be more beneficial than you thought. A longer workout means more production of nitric oxide -- an enzyme that could save you from heart disease and other problems. By Marissa Kantor, published February 8, 2005"
